arts.ttl: VfB Stuttgart’s Deniz Undav on facing Real Madrid: “We can’t shit our pants…otherwise we have no chance.”
arts.sum: Speaking to kicker, VfB Stuttgart striker Deniz Undav commented on their opening Champions League game against Real Madrid on Tuesday night. On travelling to the Bernabeu, a stadium synonymous with the…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. VfB Stuttgart: UEFA Champions League team news, match stats & LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich loanees Alex Nübel and Krätzig, and former Borussia Dortmund defender Zagadou are the only current Stuttgart players with Champions League experience. Stuttgart will start gathering their reward for a superb 2023/24 season when they visit Madrid to begin their UEFA Champions League campaign.

arts.ttl: When is Real Madrid - Stuttgart? Date, times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: On matchday one of the new-look Champions League, Real Madrid begin the defence of their European title at home to Germans VfB Stuttgart, who are back in the continent’s top club competition after over a decade away. Starting this season, UEFA has dispensed with the round-robing format in the Champions League, instead introducing a league phase in which each team plays eight games (four at home, four away) against eight different clubs .

arts.ttl: Champions League top scorers 2024/25: The latest Golden Boot standings
arts.sum: Vinicius Junior scored in the final for Real Madrid and he shared third place with Man City's Erling Haaland and Atletico Madrid's Antoine Griezmann, with that trio all registering six goals in the list of Champions League top scorers for 2023/24. Neither of the players who shared the Golden Boot made it to the Champions League final last season, with that battle instead contested between Real Madrid and Borussia Dortmund after Bayern and PSG fell in the semi-finals.

arts.ttl: Star 'good enough for Barca and Real Madrid' given Man Utd return advice
arts.sum: Gomes departed Man Utd in 2020 to join Lille, where he has grown to become an England international and is set to star in the Champions League for the Ligue 1 side, who begin their campaign on Tuesday away to Sporting CP. Manchester United academy graduate Angel Gomes has been tipped to play for Barcelona, Real Madrid or even Manchester City, highlighting the blow it was to the Red Devils that he left Old Trafford without making a true impact.

arts.ttl: Ermedin Demirović sends Stuttgart to Real Madrid glamour tie on a high
arts.sum: Last season’s Bundesliga runners-up have got the ultimate reward for their best-ever points finish, a trip to the iconic Santiago Bernabéu to face Real Madrid in their opening match of the 2024/25 Champions League season. Things appeared to be stabilised with a positive pre-season, and the competitive campaign then kicked off with a stellar showing in a Supercup defeat to champions Bayer Leverkusen, losing on penalties after stunning their rivals in a 2-2 draw in regular time.

arts.ttl: Inside Jude Bellingham's £5.5m property featuring a pool, gym and home theatre
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham is rightfully living it up in sunny Spain with his luxurious £5.5million Madrid property possessing a pool, gym and home theatre for the England star

arts.ttl: Real Madrid's Brahim Diaz 'out for two months' - how many games will he miss?
arts.sum: Real Madrid playmaker Brahim Diaz reportedly faces two months on the sidelines with the adductor injury he sustained against Real Sociedad on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid injury list for Stuttgart clash: Bellingham, Tchouameni return dates
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up Real Madrid's injury and suspension news ahead of their Champions League clash with Stuttgart on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid lineup vs. Stuttgart: Predicted XI for Champions League encounter
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Real Madrid could line up for their Champions League clash with Stuttgart at the Bernabeu on Tuesday.
